title: RiskRegisterItem
description: A known risk associated with an agent deployment.

risk_id.description: A unique identifier for this risk.

title.description: A short title for this risk.

description.description: A description of the risk and its potential impact.

status.description: The current status of this risk.

mitigation.description: Description of the mitigation applied or planned for this risk.

owner.description: The person or team responsible for managing this risk.

evidence_reference.description: A reference to evidence records related to this risk.
